name: Muddy Buddies
recipeInstructions:
1. Use 9 cups of Chex brand cereals, mixed or all one kind. Place in a large bowl.
2. Combine chocolate chips, peanut butter, and margarine in a quart microwave-safe bowl.
3. Microwave on high for 1 to 1-1/2 minutes, stirring after 1 minute until smooth.
4. Stir in vanilla.
5. Pour the chocolate mixture over the cereal, stirring until all pieces are evenly coated.
6. Transfer the cereal mix into a plastic zipper-lock bag with powdered sugar.
7. Seal securely and shake until all pieces are well coated.
8. Spread on wax paper to cool.
9. Store in an air-tight container.
